attempts.insight: Reverse inclusion is trivial; forward inclusion is the substantive Mathlib-gap content. Mathlib's `Differential.ContainConstants` typeclass targets `Differential B` (a derivation `B → B`), not `KaehlerDifferential.D : B → Ω[B⁄k]` — bridge construction is required. The char-p Cartier direction `ker D = B^p` has no off-the-shelf Mathlib lemma.
